sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n37023" key="e(ca/foron" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἑξάφορον</orth> <pron extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="pron">[ᾰ]</pron>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, at Rome, <sense id="n37023.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">litter borne by six men,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Mart.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.81.1</biblScope></bibl>. </sense> <sense n="II" id="n37023.1" level="2" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἑξάφοροι</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">οἱ</gen>, <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">bearers of such a litter,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Vitr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">10.3.7</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
